metadata.name: Dispatch Flight with an MEL Item

description: A flight is departing with an inoperative system under the MEL. The dispatcher must ensure all operational restrictions are followed.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the MEL item and its operational restrictions (e.g., flight cannot exceed a certain altitude).
Create a flight plan that respects the operational restriction, even if it's less efficient.

expected_outcome.value: Dispatcher creates a compliant flight plan.

nodes.task_description: Brief the flight crew on the MEL item and the required operational procedures before they depart.

expected_outcome.value: Dispatcher ensures the crew is aware of the situation and limitations.
